title: FancyTables
description: Texture pack that makes tables cool
body:
# What It Does
Changes **the crafting table and furnace** textures to look more modern!    
Adds swamp-like green carpet on top of a crafting table with a few instruments.    
And furnace now made out of tuff and spruce wood. Furnace now **animated** when working.   
If there was a retexture update i think those 2 would look like that.

Texture Still "Vanilla Frendly" And This All,
& Works With Every Version!

Original Idea From Pinterest for crafting table - https://pinterest.com/pin/1096978421745885646;

Thats it for V2.
